_comment: TLDs Cloudflare Registrar supports for PROGRAMMATIC registration via the domain-check / registrations API. Only these can be authoritatively confirmed and registered programmatically, so scanning is restricted to this set. The scanner further filters by config tld.length (default 3). Source: Cloudflare Registrar API 'Supported extensions'.
_note: TLDs not in 'supported' cannot be programmatically confirmed/registered and are excluded from scanning. Register unsupported extensions via the Cloudflare dashboard. 3-char TLDs (the default scan target) in this list: com, org, net, app, dev, xyz, pro, fyi, run, day, ing, icu.
